title: ipa security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[4.12.2-15.0.1.el10_0.4]
- Set IPAPLATFORM=rhel when build on Oracle Linux [Orabug: 29516674]
- Add bind to ipa-server-common Requires [Orabug: 36518596]

[4.12.2-15.el10_0.4]
- Resolves: RHEL-113245
  EMBARGOED CVE-2025-7493 ipa: Privilege escalation from host to domain admin in FreeIPA
full_text:
[4.12.2-15.0.1.el10_0.4]
- Set IPAPLATFORM=rhel when build on Oracle Linux [Orabug: 29516674]
- Add bind to ipa-server-common Requires [Orabug: 36518596]

[4.12.2-15.el10_0.4]
- Resolves: RHEL-113245
  EMBARGOED CVE-2025-7493 ipa: Privilege escalation from host to domain admin in FreeIPA

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-17085.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-7493.html
